name: Aperture Cloud, Inc.
business_model: Aperture Cloud provides a cloud-native observability and edge orchestration platform delivered via a subscription-based Software-as-a-Service model. Its suite includes infrastructure and application monitoring, distributed tracing, log analytics, AIOps automation, and policy-based edge workload management. The company monetizes via tiered subscriptions (per-host and usage-based data ingest), with add-ons for enterprise security, compliance, and premium support.
industry_position: Operates in cloud observability and edge management, positioned among the top 5 independent platforms with a diversified mid-enterprise and large enterprise customer base. Benefits from secular shift to cloud-native and microservices, with competition on feature velocity and data economics.
notes: Key customers span fintech, e-commerce, and media. Primary suppliers include public cloud vendors for hosting and data storage. Contracts generally 1–3 year terms with auto-renew.
